report.summary: UX-audited and polished 2 new learn guides (wallet security, market cycles) — fixed 7 responsive grid breakpoints for mobile, created 2 OG images, added Twitter/OG metadata, improved accessibility on WalletSecurityScoreCalculator, and added smooth scroll to both pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed Infinite vs. Limited Approvals 2-column grid on wallet security page — now uses auto-fit minmax(260px) for proper mobile stacking
Fixed 4 inner phase-card grids on market cycles page — Characteristics/On-Chain Signals columns now stack on mobile with minmax(220px)
Fixed Halvings vs. Liquidity debate 2-column grid — now responsive with minmax(280px)
Fixed Bullish/Bearish Forces tug-of-war grid — now responsive with minmax(260px)
Fixed Alt Season Timeline 3-column grid — now responsive with minmax(160px)
Added smooth scroll behavior to both pages for TOC anchor navigation
Added role='region' and aria-label to WalletSecurityScoreCalculator for screen reader accessibility

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — shield icon, $311M stat, drainers callout, security category badge, dark theme with brand gradient accent bar
OG image: crypto-market-cycles-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — sine wave cycle visualization with 4 phase labels/dots, BTC ATH $126,296 and -46.7% drawdown stats, phase indicator badges, dark theme

sections.title: Metadata & SEO Polish
items: Added OpenGraph images array to wallet security page metadata pointing to new OG SVG
Added OpenGraph images array to market cycles page metadata pointing to new OG SVG
Added Twitter card metadata (summary_large_image) to both pages with titles, descriptions, and image references

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026 — 7 responsive fixes, OG image, Twitter card, smooth scroll, accessibility
/learn/crypto-market-cycles-guide-2026 — 5 responsive grid fixes, OG image, Twitter card, smooth scroll
